name: blink
description: Blink — serverless cloud infrastructure for agentic coding. Managed SQL databases, auth, storage, serverless backends, task queues, custom domains, and production hosting.

interface.shortDescription: Serverless cloud infrastructure for agentic coding — database, auth, backend, hosting, queue, and domains
defaultPrompt: Create a new full-stack app on Blink with auth, database, and backend
Deploy my app to production with a custom domain on Blink
